hero.title: The ERP for African agri-food SMBs
hero.subtitle: Bluwa unifies production, inventory and planning with an AI copilot that speaks your leadership team’s language. Deployed in days, not months.
hero.trust: Designed with processors in Togo, Benin, Côte d’Ivoire and Senegal

problem.title: Spreadsheets everywhere, visibility nowhere
problem.subtitle: Traditional ERPs are expensive, slow to deploy and disconnected from African field operations. Agri-food SMBs lose money on every batch.

points.title: Invisible stock
points.body: Perishable raw materials, inventory gaps, unexpected stockouts · no real-time visibility across warehouses and the field.

points.title: Gut-feel planning
points.body: No MRP. Production orders rely on guesswork. The result: overproduction, shortages, and shrinking margins.

points.title: Leaders without data
points.body: Reports arrive late, aggregated, unreadable. Strategic decisions are made in the dark.

problem.solutionTitle: A lightweight ERP, an AI copilot, leaders at the center
problem.solutionBody: Bluwa is built for West African agri-food operations. Multi-site, multi-language, multi-currency, with an AI that answers leadership questions in natural language.

features.title: Your full value chain, in one platform
features.subtitle: Modules designed for the reality of agri-food SMBs: from field to delivery.

items.title: Smart MRP
items.body: Automatic material requirements over a rolling 6 months, based on forecasts and BOMs.

items.title: Multi-site stock
items.body: Warehouses, retail points, intermediate depots: unified view, batch and expiry tracking.

items.title: Production & WOs
items.body: Work orders, yield tracking, simple production declarations from the floor.

items.title: Procurement
items.body: Purchase suggestions, supplier tracking, local market price integration.

items.title: Leadership AI copilot
items.body: Ask in French or a local language. The copilot queries your data and responds with charts.

items.title: Mobile-first & offline
items.body: Field data entry without network. Syncs automatically when connection returns.

pricing.title: Pricing that grows with you
pricing.subtitle: No per-user license fees. You pay for what you produce.

items.q: How long does it take to deploy Bluwa?
items.a: Between 5 and 15 days depending on the size of your operation. We support data import and team training.
Yes. Field apps (production, inventory) work without connectivity and sync automatically.

items.q: Is my data hosted in Africa?
items.a: Regional hosting is available on demand, in addition to the default European hosting.
Mobile money (Wave, Orange Money, MTN), Sage, Excel, plus API connectors for your existing tools.

items.q: Can I try before I buy?
items.a: Yes, we offer a 30-day pilot on a single site, at a reduced rate, with no commitment.

contact.title: Let’s talk about your operation
contact.subtitle: Tell us about your business in a few lines. We get back to you within 24 business hours.
contact.name: Full name

footer.tagline: The agri-food ERP built for West Africa.
